content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

October 29, 2002

Joseph C. Folkard
Office of the County Counsel
Napa County
1195 Third Street, Room 301
Napa, CA 94559-3001

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-02-274

Dear Mr. Folkard:

After further review of your initial letter, we cannot advise you at this time as your request involves past conduct. The Commission is unable to provide written advice on issues regarding past conduct. (See section 83114(b); regulation 18329(b)(8)(A)&(C), copy enclosed).

Should you have any further questions, please contact the Commission at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: Galena West
Counsel, Legal Division
